violations.text: The hand washing sink at the bar is lacking proper signage. New Violation. Correct By: 07/17/2025
Two containers of soy milk were observed held past date of expiration. PIC disposed. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 07/03/2025

Working containers of various ingredients are not labeled with the common name of the food. Working containers holding food or food ingredients that are removed from their original packages, such as flour, herbs, salt, sugar, and spices must be labeled with the common name of the food. PIC informed. New Violation. Correct By: 07/03/2025
The following were observed in poor repair: -bar refrigerator -prep unit gaskets (PIC stated gaskets are on order). New Violation. Correct By: 07/17/2025

Wood is used in the construction of storage racks in the walk-in and for shelving next to prep area. Non-food contact surfaces of equipment that are exposed to splash, spillage, or other food soiling or that require frequent cleaning must be constructed of a nonabsorbent and smooth material. New Violation. Correct By: 07/17/2025

The non-food contact surfaces of the following have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris: -prep unit doors/gaskets -under prep unit hoods -blender bowl and base. New Violation. Correct By: 07/17/2025
The grease receptacle covers have an accumulation of grease and debris. New Violation. Correct By: 07/17/2025

The following have an accumulation of soil residue and/or food debris: -floors under the fryer -doors to cabinet over prep station. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 07/17/2025
